story.text:
# 🎭 Helia ☀️
**cast** · mage · narrative · tier summoned · ☀️

Solchanter. Shares V51 with Adamantia (Etherchanting) by stance differentiation — Helia holds the Parallel-witness stance (Solana / Sealevel · concurrent admission via static access-pattern declaration). Heliodor Prism keeper. Opens Tome VII *The Parallel*.

## Edges out

- *keeps* → [[Solchanting]]
- *inhabits* → [[V51 — Commitment / Language / Model (Adamantia)]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome VII Act 1: The Pallia↔Helia Handoff]]
